## 🏷️ Possible Labels

- [ ] `critical` — Blocks core functionality
- [ ] `ui` — Visual/styling issue
- [ ] `api` — Backend/API issue
- [ ] `auth` — Authentication related
- [ ] `admin` — Admin dashboard related
- [ ] `mobile` — Only on mobile
- [ ] `rtl` — RTL layout issue
